summary: Comprehensive testing of BC Sales Invoice Capture feature (iteration_82). Backend: 16 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend: All UI elements verified. POST /api/inventory-ledger/sales-orders/{id}/bc-invoice captures invoice after full shipment. GET invoice-log returns reverse chronological entries. Summary enriched with operational_status (committed/partially_released/partially_shipped/shipped/complete) and is_fulfillment_complete. Invoice form visible in dialog when remaining=0 and shipments exist. Fulfillment Complete indicator shows when operational_status=complete.

issues: Hydration warnings for span/tr in table - cosmetic, not functional

passed_tests: Backend: POST /sales-orders/{id}/bc-invoice returns 404 for nonexistent SO
Backend: Invoice rejected with 422 when remaining committed qty > 0
Backend: Invoice capture success for fully shipped SO (200)
Backend: Invoice log entry stores bc_invoice_number, bc_document_id, invoice_date, invoice_notes, captured_at
Backend: GET invoice-log returns reverse chronological entries
Backend: GET invoice-log returns entries for SO without invoices (empty array)
Backend: Summary returns operational_status field
Backend: Summary returns is_fulfillment_complete boolean
Backend: complete status when shipped and invoiced (is_fulfillment_complete=true)
Backend: shipped status when released but not invoiced
Backend: committed status when only commitments exist
Backend: Summary returns latest_bc_invoice_number and latest_bc_invoice_at
Backend: Invoice does not create ledger movements (informational only)
Backend REGRESSION: Shipment capture still works
Backend REGRESSION: Shipment logs still visible
Backend REGRESSION: SO summary still shows commitment/release data
Frontend: Record Shipment button visible on Demand tab
Frontend: Shipment dialog opens with SO ID input and Load button
Frontend: After loading SO, shows commitment summary with operational_status badge
Frontend: Invoice section visible when remaining=0 and shipments exist
Frontend: Invoice form with BC Invoice #, Doc ID, Date, Notes, Record Invoice button (visible when not complete)
Frontend: Invoice result display after successful capture
Frontend: Fulfillment Complete indicator shown when operational_status=complete
Frontend: Invoice History section shows captured invoices
Frontend: Operational status badge displays correct value (committed/partially_released/partially_shipped/shipped/complete)
Frontend: Shipment History section still visible (regression)
skipped_tests: Backend: test_invoice_rejected_when_no_shipment_activity (no SO without shipments but with full release available)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2455-2514: POST /sales-orders/{id}/bc-invoice validates 1) SO exists via commitments, 2) remaining committed qty = 0, 3) shipment activity exists before storing invoice log
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2517-2525: GET invoice-log returns reverse chronological entries from bc_invoice_logs collection

Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 2591-2617: operational_status derived from: complete (fully_released + shipped + invoiced), shipped (fully_released + shipped), partially_shipped (has shipment but remaining > 0), partially_released (some released), committed (no releases)

Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 967-1027: Invoice section visibility controlled by total_remaining_committed_qty <= 0 && shipmentLogs.length > 0. Invoice form shows when !summary.is_fulfillment_complete. Fulfillment Complete indicator shows when is_fulfillment_complete=true

Frontend Lines 970-997: Invoice form fields: BC Invoice # (inv-invoice-num), BC Document ID (inv-invoice-doc), Invoice Date (inv-invoice-date), Notes (inv-invoice-notes), Record Invoice button (inv-invoice-confirm)
Frontend Lines 1010-1026: Invoice History section shows reverse chronological invoice logs with bc_invoice_number, bc_document_id, invoice_date
seed_data_used: SO-TEST (Hormel Foods) - fully released and invoiced (operational_status=complete, INV-30482). SO-TEST-001 has 25 remaining committed on TEST-COMMIT-7CC683 (operational_status=partially_shipped). SO-107040 has 193 remaining on SPAM-12OZ (operational_status=partially_shipped). SO-TEST invoice-log has 3 entries including INV-TEST-82-SUCCESS created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Sales Invoice Capture feature fully tested. POST /api/inventory-ledger/sales-orders/{id}/bc-invoice requires: 1) SO exists (404), 2) remaining_committed_qty = 0 (422), 3) shipment_count > 0 (422). Stores invoice log with invoice_log_id, bc_invoice_number, bc_document_id, invoice_date, invoice_notes, captured_at. GET summary enriched with operational_status (committed/partially_released/partially_shipped/shipped/complete) and is_fulfillment_complete boolean. Frontend invoice section appears in ShipmentCaptureDialog when remaining=0 AND shipments exist. Invoice form hidden when is_fulfillment_complete=true, replaced by Fulfillment Complete indicator.

request_body.invoice_date: string YYYY-MM-DD (optional, defaults to captured_at date)

error_codes.404: No order commitments found for sales order
error_codes.422: Cannot invoice: remaining qty still committed (ship first) OR No shipment activity recorded

response.entries: [{invoice_log_id, sales_order_id, customer_id, bc_invoice_number, bc_document_id, invoice_date, invoice_notes, captured_at}]

invoice_result.shows: Invoice Captured message with invoice number and log ID

fulfillment_complete.message: Shipped and invoiced. BC is the system of record for financial posting.

operational_status_badge.location: SO summary area in shipment dialog
